all.en: This memo summarizes recent treasury operations activities and key forward priorities.
all.zh: 本備忘錄彙整近期資金部營運活動與主要前瞻優先事項。

all.en: Cash positions remain healthy across all major operating regions and entities.
all.zh: 所有主要營運地區與實體的現金部位維持健康水準。

all.en: Available liquidity totals approximately one point two billion dollars globally.
all.zh: 全球可動用流動性合計約十二億美元。

all.en: Short term investment yields have improved due to recent central bank decisions.
all.zh: 短期投資收益因近期央行決策而有所提升。

all.en: We continue to ladder maturities to balance yield and liquidity requirements.
all.zh: 我們持續分散到期日，以平衡收益與流動性需求。

all.en: Counterparty exposure remains well below internal concentration limits.
all.zh: 交易對手曝險仍遠低於內部集中度上限。

all.en: Foreign exchange hedging covers approximately seventy percent of forecast exposures.
all.zh: 外匯避險涵蓋預估曝險約百分之七十。

all.en: Rolling twelve month coverage strategy continues for the major operating currencies.
all.zh: 主要營運幣別持續採取滾動十二個月的避險策略。

all.en: Recent currency volatility has been managed through forward contracts and options.
all.zh: 近期匯率波動已透過遠期合約與選擇權加以管理。

all.en: Intercompany funding has been restructured to optimize tax efficiency this quarter.
all.zh: 關係企業融資已於本季重新調整以最佳化稅務效率。

all.en: Cash pooling structures in Europe and Asia continue to perform as designed.
all.zh: 歐洲與亞洲地區的現金集中架構持續依設計運作良好。

all.en: We renegotiated banking fees with three top tier relationship banks this quarter.
all.zh: 本季已與三家頂級往來銀行重新議定銀行費用。

all.en: Annual savings from these negotiations are estimated at two million dollars.
all.zh: 預估這些議價帶來的年度節省約為兩百萬美元。

all.en: Our revolving credit facility was successfully extended by an additional year.
all.zh: 我方循環信用額度已順利延長一年。

all.en: Total commitments remain at one billion dollars across the syndicate of lenders.
all.zh: 聯貸銀行團總承貸金額維持於十億美元。

all.en: Covenant compliance remains comfortably within all required financial ratios.
all.zh: 財務契約遵循情形皆穩健地維持於所有財務比率規範內。

all.en: Credit rating agencies recently reaffirmed our long term rating with stable outlook.
all.zh: 信評機構近期再次確認我方長期信評，展望維持穩定。

all.en: Investor relations meetings with bondholders are planned for the next two months.
all.zh: 與債券持有人的投資人關係會議計劃於未來兩個月舉行。

all.en: A pilot of an artificial intelligence cash forecasting tool is currently underway.
all.zh: 人工智慧現金預測工具的試行作業目前正在進行中。

all.en: Early results show improved accuracy in monthly cash flow projections.
all.zh: 初步結果顯示每月現金流預測的準確度有所提升。

all.en: We will share a more detailed update at the next finance leadership offsite.
all.zh: 我們將於下次財務領導離地會議分享更詳細的進度更新。

all.en: Please reach out with any questions on liquidity, risk, or banking matters.
all.zh: 如有流動性、風險或銀行業務相關問題，歡迎與我們聯繫。

all.en: Digital payment platforms are being evaluated to reduce wire transfer processing costs.
all.zh: 正評估數位支付平台，以降低電匯處理成本。

all.en: Fraud prevention controls were enhanced following a recent industry wide threat assessment.
all.zh: 近期完成業界全面性威脅評估後已強化詐欺防制控制。

all.en: Sustainability linked credit facilities are under exploration for next year's refinancing.
all.zh: 永續連結信用額度正評估列入明年再融資安排。

all.en: Pension plan asset liability matching strategies remain a focus area for the team.
all.zh: 退休金計畫之資產負債配對策略仍為團隊重點工作項目。

all.en: Insurance program renewals will be completed before the end of the calendar year.
all.zh: 保險方案續約將於本曆年底前完成。

all.en: Working capital efficiency metrics have improved significantly through supplier program initiatives.
all.zh: 透過供應商方案推動，營運資金效率指標顯著改善。

all.en: Treasury policy updates will be circulated for executive review next quarter.
all.zh: 資金部政策更新將於下季送交高階主管審閱。

all.en: Training on the new treasury management system is scheduled for September.
all.zh: 新版資金管理系統訓練排定於九月舉辦。

all.en: Documentation standards have been refreshed to align with global audit expectations.
all.zh: 文件作業標準已重新整理，以契合全球稽核之要求。

all.en: Thank you to the entire treasury team for outstanding performance this quarter.
all.zh: 感謝整個資金團隊本季展現的卓越表現。

all.en: Real time visibility dashboards display global cash positions across over fifty accounts.
all.zh: 即時可視化儀表板顯示橫跨逾五十個帳戶之全球現金部位。

all.en: Interest rate sensitivity modeling helps inform funding decisions for the coming year.
all.zh: 利率敏感度模型有助於告知未來一年之融資決策。

all.en: Bond market issuance opportunities are continuously monitored across all major financial centers.
all.zh: 債券市場發行機會於所有主要金融中心持續監控。

all.en: Commercial paper programs maintain backup support from committed bank credit facilities.
all.zh: 商業本票計畫之備援由承諾型銀行信用額度提供支持。

all.en: Repo facility arrangements diversify short term funding sources beyond traditional bank deposits.
all.zh: 附買回交易機制使短期融資來源多元化，不限於傳統銀行存款。

all.en: Settlement cycle reductions in major markets require updated operational procedures globally.
all.zh: 主要市場結算週期縮短需於全球更新作業程序。

all.en: Treasury workstation upgrades will improve reporting capabilities and reduce manual reconciliation work.
all.zh: 資金管理系統升級將提升報表能力並減少人工調節作業。

all.en: Counterparty credit reviews are performed quarterly using both internal and external data sources.
all.zh: 交易對手信用檢視每季使用內部與外部資料來源執行。

all.en: Tax efficient repatriation strategies continue to be refined with input from external advisors.
all.zh: 稅務效率盈餘匯回策略持續結合外部顧問之意見加以精進。

all.en: We welcome dialogue with stakeholders about our broader treasury and capital strategy.
all.zh: 歡迎利害關係人就我方更廣泛之資金與資本策略進行交流。
